user_query:
I'm prepping for back-to-back battle sequences and need our makeup communications tightened up and aligned with my updated signature/disclaimer. Please use the inputs in this workspace to update my config, rewrite two emails, and produce an addendum to the makeup protocol.

Inputs:
- config/email_profile.yaml (current email profile)
- input/drafts_emails.json (two rough email drafts)
- input/docs/protocol_current.md (current protocol v1.0)
- input/docs/makeup_incident_notes.md (field notes from the last shoot)

Do the following:
1) Update the email profile config (modify in place at config/email_profile.yaml):
   - Set mobile to "+1 (747) 555-0199".
   - Ensure signature_lines exactly include (and in this order):
     - "Kade Bannon"
     - "Lead Actor | 'Iron Meridian'"
     - "SAG-AFTRA Member"
     - "Mobile: +1 (747) 555-0199"
   - Update disclaimer so it reads the existing sentence followed by a space and this additional sentence: "Makeup and prosthetics must comply with union skin safety guidelines." (Keep as a single YAML string.)
   - Set tone to "professional-warm" and signoff to "Thanks".
   - Keep the YAML valid and preserve other existing fields.

2) Rewrite the two emails from input/drafts_emails.json and save them as plain text files:
   - output/emails/makeup_dept_email.txt
   - output/emails/director_ad_email.txt
   Requirements for each email:
   - Start with a concise one-sentence context, then a bulleted "Action items" list (at least 2 items), then a single-sentence closing line.
   - Each email must be 180 words or fewer.
   - Use the exact product names from input/docs/makeup_incident_notes.md when making recommendations (e.g., "ProSkin Bond", "AquaFix Foam", "CitrusFX Remover", "UltraHold Black").
   - Include a Subject: line at the top. Subjects must include the relevant shoot date from the draft ("2026-05-03" for the makeup department email; "2026-05-04" for the director/AD email). Also include the keywords "patch test" (makeup email) and "buffer" (director/AD email).
   - The makeup department email must specify a patch test at "2026-05-03 07:00".
   - The director/AD email must request a 15-minute buffer before close-ups on "2026-05-04".
   - End with the updated signoff "Thanks," followed by the signature lines from config/email_profile.yaml exactly as updated (each on its own line), and then the full disclaimer text from the updated config as the final paragraph.

3) Produce an updated protocol with an addendum:
   - Create output/docs/protocol_v1.1.md by copying all content from input/docs/protocol_current.md and appending a new section titled "Addendum v1.1 — Skin Safety Updates" constructed from input/docs/makeup_incident_notes.md.
   - The addendum must include:
     - A 1–2 sentence problem summary based on the notes.
     - "Allowed products" (bulleted) listing: ProSkin Bond, AquaFix Foam, CitrusFX Remover.
     - "Products to avoid" (bulleted) listing: UltraHold Black.
     - "Removal steps" as an ordered list derived from the notes.
     - "Patch test" line including the exact date/time: 2026-05-03 07:00.
     - A "Prepared by" line using the updated config values in this format: "Prepared by Kade Bannon (Lead Actor) | Mobile: +1 (747) 555-0199".

Consistency checks to satisfy:
- Product names in both emails and the addendum must exactly match those in input/docs/makeup_incident_notes.md.
- Each email must include the updated signature lines and the updated disclaimer verbatim from config/email_profile.yaml.
- The subject lines must include the required dates and keywords as specified above.
- output/docs/protocol_v1.1.md must contain the full original protocol content followed by the new Addendum v1.1 section.

Deliverables to create:
- Modified file: config/email_profile.yaml (in place, updated as specified)
- New files:
  - output/emails/makeup_dept_email.txt
  - output/emails/director_ad_email.txt
  - output/docs/protocol_v1.1.md All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
